grid_system.metrics_row: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8

surface_strategies.cards: bg-white border border-[#E2E2D9] rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
surface_strategies.table_header: bg-[#F0F0E8] border-y border-[#E2E2D9] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#596157]
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-white border border-[#E2E2D9] rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#3A5C45]/20 focus:border-[#3A5C45] transition-all

motion_and_interactions.feedback: Use micro-interactions for stock updates (e.g., subtle green flash on increment, red on decrement).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Ensure focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary/20) are visible on all interactive elements. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

buttons.primary: bg-[#3A5C45] text-white hover:bg-[#2D4836] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-[#E2E2D9] text-[#1E231D] hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-[#FAECEB] text-[#A33022] hover:bg-[#F3D8D5] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all

badges.in_stock: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#E8F0EA] text-[#2B593F]
badges.low_stock: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#FDF3E1] text-[#B36B00]
badges.out_of_stock: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#FAECEB] text-[#A33022]

hero_or_header_bg.description: Person working on a solar panel. Use as an ambient background for a welcome banner or login screen with a heavy white/stone gradient overlay (e.g., bg-white/80).

empty_state_illustration.description: Close up of pipes and wires. Use in empty state cards or 'No Inventory' alerts with a heavy grayscale filter and low opacity.

testing_attributes.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic blue/indigo SaaS colors. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette (Forest Green/Stone/Terracotta) provided.
The UI must feel like a tactile 'Control Room'. Use the tight 1px borders and avoid muddy drop shadows.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions if possible, but style them to match the flat/tactile aesthetic.
Ensure the Motor Requirement Logic clearly displays what components are missing if a system cannot be built. Use the danger/warning colors for missing components.
The Withdraw functionality must update the inventory state in real-time and recalculate the maximum production feasibility immediately.
Format the inventory table with clear columns: Item Name, Category, Current Stock, Required for 3HP/5HP/7.5HP, Status, and Quick Actions (+/-).
Never use placeholder images like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided Unsplash URLs.
